summary: Capture the default Overview view on load, with KPI cards, the time-series line chart, and the top-emitters bar chart.

content.objective: Verify that the dashboard opens on the Overview view in its default state, showing the KPI cards and both charts.
actions: Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
validations: The Overview view is shown with the heading Overview
Four KPI cards are visible, including Total emissions 2023 and Top emitter 2023
The Top emitter 2023 card shows China
A line chart titled Emissions over time and a bar chart titled Top emitters are both visible

summary: Navigate from Overview to the Explorer view using the sidebar and confirm the data table renders.

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Explorer item in the sidebar switches to the Explorer view and shows the data table.
actions: Click the Explorer button in the left sidebar
validations: The Explorer view is shown with the heading Explorer
A data table is visible with column headers Country, Region, and Total CO2 (Mt)
The result count reads 42 countries
The table shows data rows for multiple countries

summary: Filter the Explorer table by typing a country name into the search box.

content.objective: Verify that typing a country name into the search box filters the table to matching rows only.
actions: Click the Explorer button in the left sidebar
Type 'Japan' into the Search by country input
validations: The table shows a single row for Japan
The result count reads 1 country
No countries other than Japan are shown in the table

summary: Filter the Explorer table to a single region using the Region dropdown.

content.objective: Verify that selecting a region in the Region dropdown narrows the table to that region and updates the result count.
actions: Click the Explorer button in the left sidebar
validations: Every visible row in the Region column shows Europe
The result count reads 12 countries
No countries from other regions remain in the table

summary: Sort the Explorer table descending by clicking a numeric column header.

content.objective: Verify that clicking the Per capita column header sorts the table in descending order, putting the largest value in the top row.
actions: Click the Explorer button in the left sidebar
Click the Per capita (t) column header
validations: The Per capita (t) column header shows a descending sort indicator
The first data row is Qatar
The Per capita value in the first row is the largest in that column

summary: Clear an active search and region filter to restore the full row set.

content.objective: Verify that, after filtering, clicking Clear filters returns the full set of countries to the table.
actions: Click the Explorer button in the left sidebar
Type 'China' into the Search by country input
validations: The Search by country input is empty
The result count reads 42 countries
Countries from more than one region are shown again

summary: Negative case: a search query that matches nothing shows the empty state.

content.objective: Verify that typing a nonsense query shows an empty-state message and removes all data rows from the table.
actions: Click the Explorer button in the left sidebar
Type 'zzzz' into the Search by country input
validations: An empty-state message reading No matching countries is shown
The table has no data rows
The result count reads 0 countries
